description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, high-tech design with a robust, rounded shell and a large, dark-tinted visor that covers the entire face area. The exterior is primarily white with weathered, scratched surfaces, accented by metallic gray and black components, and highlighted with gold and teal details. Prominent mechanical elements, such as reinforced side modules, thick cables, and a central circular device on the front, suggest advanced functionality and protection. The top of the helmet displays intricate, circuit-like patterns and a teal-lit interface, adding to its sci-fi aesthetic. The rear is smooth and rounded, with two horizontal black vent-like structures and metallic fasteners. The overall build appears solid and protective, suitable for urban environments requiring both safety and technological integration.
description: A futuristic, full-face helmet with a dark visor, white and metallic body, and advanced mechanical details, featuring teal-lit accents and weathered surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, dark visor, central teal-lit device, and intricate top patterns, emphasizing the helmet's technological features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the weathered white shell, reinforced side module, thick cable, and gold-accented mechanical parts.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a smooth, rounded back with two horizontal black vent-like structures and metallic fasteners, lacking the visor.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same mechanical module and cable, with visible scratches and wear on the white surface.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two horizontal vent-like structures on the rear, rectangular in shape, no visible front or top vents.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract circuit-like patterns and teal-lit interface on the top, with weathered and scratched surfaces; no text or prominent motifs.
